title: phalangium narcissifolium
intro: Phalangium narcissifolium, also known as Monkey Flower, is a flowering plant species in the family Phrymaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Phalangium narcissifolium include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations often involve making teas or infusions from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
